title: BGMI 4.4 update now available for Android users in India with Hero’s Crown mode, new features
snippet: KRAFTON India will start rolling out the BGMI 4.4 update for Android users via the Google Play Store. The update introduces a new Hero’s Crown-themed mode, gameplay enhancements, and visual improvements, with phased availability expected for all users by today.

title: 7 AI-powered scams Indians are falling for in 2026: Deepfakes, fake HR calls and more
snippet: AI-powered scams are becoming more sophisticated in India, with fraudsters using cloned voices, deepfake videos and realistic phishing emails to target users. From fake HR interviews and “digital arrest” scams to fraudulent AI trading apps, cybercriminals are exploiting trust at scale.

title: Samsung Electronics set to face major strike on Thursday after union talks collapse

title: OpenAI to open its first applied AI lab outside of US in Singapore
snippet: OpenAI is establishing its first applied AI lab outside the United States in Singapore. The company plans to hire around 200 people in the coming years. OpenAI will invest more than S$300 million in the city-state. This collaboration aims to boost AI innovation and talent. Singapore seeks to become

title: Google DeepMind hires staff from Contextual AI in licensing deal, source says
snippet: Google DeepMind is reportedly acquiring over 20 researchers and licensing technology from AI startup Contextual AI for $80 million to $90 million. This move follows Alphabet's strategy of talent acquisition through licensing deals, similar to past agreements with Windsurf and Character.AI.

title: Google unveils smart glasses, taking on Meta

title: Meta offers AI rival chatbots limited free WhatsApp access, sources say
snippet: Meta Platforms has offered European AI chatbots free access to its WhatsApp messaging service, with charges to be implemented after a usage limit is reached. This proposal aims to appease EU regulators investigating Meta's market practices.

title: Meta begins 8,000 global job cuts in Asian hub of Singapore
